name: Ableskiver
recipeInstructions:
1. Set an ableskiver pan over low heat.
2. Sift together and set aside:
- Combine 1 cup thick sour cream, 2/3 cup milk, and 3 beaten egg yolks in a bowl.
- Stir in 2 tablespoons melted butter until well blended.
3. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients (sifted flour mixture).
4. Add the liquid mixture all at once to the well, stirring until just combined.
5. Beat 3 egg whites with a mixer on high speed until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the batter.
7. Test the pan by dropping a few drops of cold water; if they sizzle and form small beads, the temperature is right. Grease the wells generously with butter (about 1/2 teaspoon per well).
8. Pour batter into the wells, filling them about halfway full.
9. With a fork, gently turn the ableskivers frequently to brown evenly. Do not pierce.
10. The ableskivers are done when a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Serve immediately sprinkled with confectioners' sugar. If desired, accompany with tart jam. About 4 dozen balls.
Apple Pancake Balls (Ableskiver II)
Follow the above recipe. Rinse, pare, and dice 2 medium-sized apples. Sprinkle about 1 teaspoon of diced apples over the batter in each well.
